_comment: Paste the entries inside the hooks.PreToolUse array of your ~/.claude/settings.json. Redirects direct Read/Grep on memory directories to use QMD instead, saving ~10x tokens.

hooks.command: bash -c 'TOOL_INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "(\.agent-daemon/memory|/\.claude/projects/.*/memory)"; then echo "{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"Direct read of memory files is bypassed. Use mcp__qmd__search for retrieval — same content, ranked by relevance, ~10x cheaper on tokens.\"}"; else echo "{\"decision\": \"approve\"}"; fi'
